summary: Wrote 128 unit tests across 9 test classes for suite-evidence-risk/risk/runtime/iast_advanced.py. All 128 pass. Module coverage for iast_advanced.py reached 93.30%.
issues: VulnerabilityType.MALICIOUS_PAYLOAD does not exist in the enum but is referenced at line 576 inside _analyze_with_anomaly_detection. When an anomaly IS detected this method raises AttributeError. Tests document this bug and verify the non-anomaly path does not trigger it.

ControlFlowAnalyzer.build_cfg only populates self.cfg with nodes that have outgoing edges (i.e. when >= 2 control-flow nodes are collected by the visitor). Tests for if/for/while branches use two statements to produce an edge.
StatisticalAnomalyDetector.detect_anomaly returns np.bool_ not Python bool, so 'is False' identity checks fail. Tests use truthiness checks (not x / assert x) instead.
